metadata.description: Persona-driven AI development team for Claude Code

plugins.name: agentic-dev-team

plugins.name: agentic-security-assessment
plugins.description: Deep security assessment + adversarial ML red-team: SARIF-first tool orchestration, narrowly-scoped LLM agents, FP-reduction with fallback banner, compliance mapping, service-comm diagramming, and a self-owned-target red-team harness. Companion plugin to agentic-dev-team. (Renamed from agentic-security-review in v1.0.0.)
